isStringTitle: The title must be a text string.
minMaxTitle: The title must be between 3 and 40 characters.
isStringSubtitle: The subtitle must be a text string.
minMaxSubtitle: The subtitle must be between 3 and 40 characters.
isStringDescription: The description must be a text string.
minMaxDescription: The description must be between 10 and 1000 characters.
dateInvalid: The date must have the format YYYY-MM-DD.
timeInvalid: The time must have the format HH:mm:ss.
modalityInvalid: The modality must be On-site or Virtual.
addressIsString: The address must be a text string.
adressLenght: The address must be between 3 and 100 characters.
linkIsString: The link must be a text string.
linkLenght: The link must be between 3 and 500 characters.
langIsString: The language must be a text string.
wordIsString: The keyword must be a text string.
wordLenght: The keyword must be between 3 and 30 characters.
usernameIsString: The username must be a text string.
usernameLength: The username must be between 8 and 15 characters.
usernameUpdateLength: The username must be between 4 and 15 characters.
passwordIsString: The password must be a text string.
passwordLength: The password must be between 8 and 20 characters.
passwordMinLength: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
passwordFormat: The password must contain at least 3 numbers and one uppercase letter.
